title: SlashBlade: HF Blade
description: FE Energy SlashBlade, as a playable lib
body:
Welcome to SlashBlade:HF Blade

This is a simple SlashBlade:Resharped addon library for FE Energy SlashBlade.  

***

This addon add 2 items: HF Blade from MGRR & Prototype HF SlashBlade (for blank FE Blade)

You could charge the blades with FE energy, then power it up for powered features.  

Energy details is in the blade's tooltip, check it for current energy status.  

 

Let's Dance!

***
